strategy: Bottom-of-funnel. South Wales homeowners already aware of solar. Angles: finance = £0 upfront, month-one savings, property value ROI, MCS trust, energy independence. Finance available is the #1 differentiator — lean into it hard.

ads.angle: Finance — saving from day one before you pay a penny
ads.hook: What if your solar panels saved you money before you spent any?
ads.body:
With finance, your monthly repayment is typically less than what you currently pay for electricity.

Day one. Before you've written a cheque. Before you've paid a penny of your own money.

MCS certified installation. South Wales survey. Free, no obligation, no hard sell.

Run your numbers in 30 seconds.

ads.hook: Solar with £0 upfront. No savings needed. No cash required. Here's how South Wales homeowners are doing it.
ads.body:
Finance changes the maths completely.

You don't need savings. You don't need a lump sum. You just need to own your home.

The panels go on. The bills come down. The repayments come out — and in most cases, the net cost is less than what you were already paying.

MCS certified. Free survey. We'll show you your exact numbers.

ads.angle: Welsh energy bills — make inaction feel expensive
ads.hook: The average South Wales household spends £1,800+ a year on electricity. Solar makes that number optional.
ads.body:
Cardiff. Swansea. Newport. Across South Wales, homeowners are watching their energy bills disappear — while their neighbours are still paying full rate.

Solar is no longer a luxury. With finance available and MCS certification, it's the most logical home upgrade you can make.

Free survey. Zero obligation. We'll tell you exactly what your roof qualifies for.

ads.angle: Property value ROI — finance makes it extraordinary
ads.hook: Solar adds an average of £30,000 to UK property values. With finance, your upfront cost is £0. Do that maths.
ads.body:
You spend nothing. Your home gains a certified solar system. Your EPC rating improves. Your property value rises.

And every month, your electricity bill is lower — often enough to cover the finance repayment entirely.

This is what a smart home investment looks like in 2026.

MCS certified. Free survey. South Wales specialist.
